notes: v34.2 • Frontend-only. Modal z-index 750 (fixes all dirty-check close/cancel buttons). Bottom shadow fixed (box-shadow moved to .open only). Percent inputs reformat on sheet open. Loan edit reformats. PIN breach popup fixed (autocomplete=one-time-code). Auto-logout 30s countdown warning. Wizard: 9-step reorder (streaks folded into step 7 inline), chore sheet DOM fix (no longer pops under), payment day selector in step 4, calendar/email gating on chore options, 🪄Setup button in child picker pills, edit-mode wizard prefilled.
